THEALCHEMIST-ADULTERATE.description: Choose a card in your Hand to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Dross+[/green]|[gold]Dross[/gold]}.
THEALCHEMIST-ADULTERATE.title: Adulterate
THEALCHEMIST-ALBEDO.description:
Lose all [gold]Poison[/gold].
Gain that much [gold]Regen[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: (+1)|}.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Citrinitas+[/green]|[gold]Citrinitas[/gold]} into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-ALBEDO.title: Albedo
THEALCHEMIST-ASSAY.title: Assay
THEALCHEMIST-BIDE.title: Bide
THEALCHEMIST-CARAPACE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Toxic[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
THEALCHEMIST-CARAPACE.title: Carapace
THEALCHEMIST-CITRINITAS.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal that much damage to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|a random enemy}.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Rubedo+[/green]|[gold]Rubedo[/gold]} into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-CITRINITAS.title: Citrinitas
THEALCHEMIST-CONGEAL.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-CONGEAL.title: Congeal
THEALCHEMIST-CORNERED.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If your HP is below 50%, deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
THEALCHEMIST-CORNERED.title: Cornered
THEALCHEMIST-DEFEND_ALCHEMIST.title: Defend
THEALCHEMIST-DISTILLATE.title: Distillate
THEALCHEMIST-DROSS.title: Dross
THEALCHEMIST-ENERVATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEALCHEMIST-ENERVATE.title: Enervate
THEALCHEMIST-FALTER.title: Falter
THEALCHEMIST-FUMIGATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-FUMIGATE.title: Fumigate
THEALCHEMIST-IMPROVISE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play a random Skill from your Discard Pile.
THEALCHEMIST-IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
THEALCHEMIST-INOCULATE.title: Inoculate
THEALCHEMIST-LEADEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Dross[/gold] into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-LEADEN.title: Leaden
THEALCHEMIST-MIASMA.description: Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies and players.
THEALCHEMIST-MIASMA.title: Miasma
THEALCHEMIST-NIGREDO.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies and players.
Add an {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Albedo+[/green]|[gold]Albedo[/gold]} into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-NIGREDO.title: Nigredo
THEALCHEMIST-POULTICE.description:
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
THEALCHEMIST-POULTICE.title: Poultice
THEALCHEMIST-PUNCTURE.title: Puncture
THEALCHEMIST-RECONSTITUTE.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Put a card from your Discard Pile into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-RECONSTITUTE.title: Reconstitute
THEALCHEMIST-RUBEDO.description:
Gain {Gold:diff()} Gold.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Upgrade a card in your Hand.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Nigredo+[/green]|[gold]Nigredo[/gold]} into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-RUBEDO.title: Rubedo
THEALCHEMIST-SIPHON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw a card for each debuff you have.
THEALCHEMIST-SIPHON.title: Siphon
THEALCHEMIST-SPATTER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {hits:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
THEALCHEMIST-SPATTER.title: Spatter
THEALCHEMIST-STEEP.title: Steep
THEALCHEMIST-STRIKE_ALCHEMIST.title: Strike
THEALCHEMIST-TEMPER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a card in your Hand to [gold]Transform[/gold] into a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]}.
THEALCHEMIST-TEMPER.title: Temper
THEALCHEMIST-TINGE.title: Tinge
